data.content:
Implementation review rejected.

Findings:
1. src/lib/terminal-manager-take-child.ts:205-219 never adds a Gemini-specific interactive branch. When take-loop selects Gemini with interactive capabilities, it falls through to the generic Claude-style args (`-p --input-format stream-json --verbose --output-format stream-json --dangerously-skip-permissions`) instead of the Gemini session args defined in src/lib/agent-adapter.ts and used by the initial claimed-step path in src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-child.ts:377-379. This breaks acceptance criterion 1 for take-loop sessions.
2. Acceptance criterion 4 is still underspecified in coverage. The new Gemini tests validate the shared runtime and buildGeminiInteractiveArgs directly, but there is no test covering the take-loop spawn path in terminal-manager-take-child, which is why the regression above passes CI.

Validation run in /Users/cartine/foolery/.claude/worktrees/gemini-interactive-session:
- bun run lint: passed (one existing React Compiler warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx)
- bunx tsc --noEmit: passed
- bun run test: passed (228 files, 2558 tests)
- bun run build: passed
